name: Col
author: Colin Vout / AGP
description: Col (Colin Vout) — a map-colouring combinatorial game on a square grid. On your turn you colour one empty cell with YOUR colour, but never on a cell orthogonally adjacent to a cell already holding your own colour (adjacency to the opponent's colour is allowed; diagonals are unrestricted). Normal play: the player with no legal move loses (last to move wins). Its dual, Snort, instead forbids adjacency to the OPPONENT's colour.
